description: Workflow to fetch NBA scores, add raw data as supplementary entities, and notify subscribers
name: NBA_Scores_Fetch_Notify_Workflow

transitions.description: Fetch NBA scores for the game date
transitions.end_state_description: NBA scores have been fetched and added to the entity
transitions.name: fetch_scores

externalized_processors.description: Fetch NBA scores asynchronously and update entity
externalized_processors.name: process_fetch_scores

transitions.description: Add raw NBA scores as supplementary entities
transitions.end_state_description: Raw NBA scores added as supplementary entities
transitions.name: add_raw_scores
transitions.start_state_description: NBA scores have been fetched and added to the entity

transitions.description: Notify subscribers with the NBA scores summary
transitions.end_state_description: Subscribers have been notified with the daily NBA scores
transitions.name: notify_subscribers

externalized_processors.description: Send email notifications to subscribers asynchronously
externalized_processors.name: process_notify_subscribers

transitions.start_state_description: Raw NBA scores added as supplementary entities
